name: explainer-video
description: Turn Codex-authored storyboards and images into narrated hand-drawn explainer videos.

interface.shortDescription: Turn text or documents into narrated videos up to five minutes.
interface.longDescription: Understand source material in Codex, create a three-scene storyboard and three to four editorial whiteboard illustrations, then render a narrated hand-drawn explainer video.
defaultPrompt: Make an explainer video from this
把这个做成 60 秒解释视频
Turn this document into a narrated whiteboard video
